mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_USER_QUEST_PK.nextval FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_USER_QUEST ( user_quest_id, user_id, quest_id, status, started_at, completed_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userQuestId}, #{userId}, #{questId}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_QUEST_ID, USER_ID, QUEST_ID, STATUS, STARTED_AT, COMPLETED_AT, CREATED_AT FROM LQ_USER_QUEST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND QUEST_ID = #{questId}

SELECT uq.USER_QUEST_ID as userQuestId, uq.QUEST_ID as questId, uq.STATUS as status, uq.STARTED_AT as startedAt, uq.COMPLETED_AT as completedAt, q.STATUS as questStatus, q.TITLE as title, q.DESCRIPTION as description, q.CATEGORY as category, q.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, q.REWARD_POINT as rewardPoint, q.TIME_LIMIT as timeLimit FROM LQ_USER_QUEST uq INNER JOIN LQ_QUEST q ON q.QUEST_ID = uq.QUEST_ID WHERE uq.USER_ID = #{_parameter} AND q.STATUS != 'DELETED' ORDER BY NVL(uq.STARTED_AT, uq.CREATED_AT) DESC, uq.USER_QUEST_ID DESC
